name: Current Folder Notes

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description: Bug fixes.
releases.name: Pane Fix

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed duplicate file handling: Resolved an issue where clicking on files with the same name from different folders would open the wrong file. The plugin now correctly handles duplicate filenames across your vault.

## What This Fixes
This update addresses a critical issue that occurred when two or more files with the same name existed in different folders within your Obsidian vault. The plugin now uses full file paths rather than just filenames when opening files, ensuring that you always navigate to the exact file you intended.

## Upgrade Instructions
Please update to version 1.7.14 to ensure proper file navigation in your Obsidian vault, especially if you have multiple files with the same name.
releases.name: Fixed Pathing Issue

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description: Bug fix: Fixed issue where plugin sometimes opens panes and doesn't close them, leaving empty panes.

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description: Similar fix, I noticed that there seemed to be panes that were not closing properly, leaving 'empty panes' so I fixed the unloading method. This time, following official docs recommendation not to detach leaves in onunload. Also ensuring that the refresh will close extra leaves.
releases.name: Bug fixing extra panes

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description: I noticed that there seemed to be panes that were not closing properly, leaving 'empty panes' so I fixed the unloading method.
releases.name: Bug Fix - Unloading

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description:
- Added new feature to show heading outline of all notes in the folder (default off)
- Better Distinction for Current File & Headings (CSS Changes) 
- Fixed error messages
releases.name: Feature (All Files Heading) & Appearance Improvements

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description:
Added a priority system that does sorting of the notes by their titles, with numbers prefixed by T taking priority over numbers prefixed by Y. Use case: T (Timeline) and Y (Year) for novel writing convention.

Also interprets headings better with `## [[Basic Heading|My Heading]]` being converted to show only `My Heading` in the outline

![image](https://github.com/Caffa/Obsidian-Current-Folder-Note-Display-Plugin/assets/1797721/513aafaf-3838-4905-a3f4-e2cf203c78e6)
releases.name: Better Outline Sorting and Alias for Headings

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description: Changed the way I search for files in the same folder to be more efficient (check through less files), which should help prevent startup lag.
releases.name: Faster load times

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description: Listing of notes now sorts by number in title of notes properly: (1, 2, 11) instead of (1, 11, 12)
releases.name: Number Sorting

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description:

More obsidian community guideline fixes. Removed Heading from Settings.

releases.author: Caffa
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Caffa/Obsidian-Current-Folder-Note-Display-Plugin/commits/1.1.0

This is a working release with the title filters for current folder note (include and exclude) and the list of files in the side panel under the current folder. It refreshes when you change active note.

Extras
- an option to make the title of notes prettier (title case)
- an indicator of which note you are currently in
- an option to include in notes in subfolders (false by default)
releases.name: 1.1.0 - First initial release
